reviews.review_text: Love the serenity of mission Beach

Amenities were well looked after
Number of toilets and showers seem not sufficent for such a big camp ground
Very friendly personnel
Nice place, on the beach with clean facilities and easy access to shops.
Manager has every right to be proud of this park with perfect location. Adjoins beach, park and great array of speciality food with character.
Terry and staff are a pleasure to deal with. A great well maintained park.

One of the best beaches on the east coast of Australia, and metres from the beach at Mission Beach Camping and Caravan Park.
An established park with customer focused management under Terry, highly recommended.

Great stay! The staff were super accommodating, sites were spacious and flat, kitchen was fantastic for a break from our caravan setup, and the laundry was FREE! Dog friendly and a fantastic, convenient setup right on the beach as well. Highly recommend.
Paradise right in the heart of town. Definitely a favourite spot to chill out in.
Site 17 puts you straight onto the beach and it a short walk to town.
Great location on the beach and close to the hub for entertainment. Good facilities for the campervanners and caravanners.
Sehr schöner, kleiner und ruhiger Campingplatz direkt am Strand. Die duschen und Toiletten sind auch sehr sauber.
Nice campsite beach front. Toilet/shower were clean.
Amazing place, clean, friendly close to everything Staff are amazing and helpful nightly recommend
arrived late in the dark, found it no problem, prompt email instructions on how to access info on site location, then such a short walk to the village. amazing scenary to wake up to.
Camping piccolo, ma in posizione spettacolare! Servizi semplici ma efficienti e puliti.
Love staying at Mission Beach, the crew are always very friendly and engaging, always a can do and no problem attitude
Facilities are very clean. Close to the beach. Nice track to walk.
Beautiful location, right on the beach.  WiFi is terrible, lucky to get it to work, but you’re in such an amazing place. Facilities good. I would recommend.
Beautiful and handy location, easy access,  lots of shade, clean amenities and friendly staff. Recommend this caravan park.

An excellent site with great communication, helpful and friendly staff. After a delay with picking up our motorhome on our first day, we arrived last on-site and picked up an envelope which gave all instructions needed for us to settle on the site. The next morning we were helped with the amenities, filling our water etc. Location is also fantastic, right on the beautiful Mission Beach. Thank you for a great stay, would highly recommend!

Sehr gemütlicher Camping mit tollem Strand, an dem man aber wegen den Quallen nicht schwimmen kann  Vielen dank an Ethan für die Hilfe, unser Campervan ist inzwischen wieder dicht. Lg die Schweizerinnen
Really nice Caravan Park. Great location, friendly staff and good amenities.

Beautiful location nice and relaxing. Park has all the amenities and very clean facilities. Everything is close by walking distance beaches,  shops and the Tavern. Highly recommended staying there 😃😃😃😃😃

Great value for money, owner is very kind and helpful. There’s everything you need in the kitchens. Bathrooms are clean and laundry area is free! Quite a rarity to find free laundry service in a camp park, would definitely come back and recommend!
They also got a lovely selection of t-shirts and bags and other cute souvenirs!
Thanks so much!

Absolutely stunning spot, right on the beach 🌊😎
Lovely small park but with plenty of room.
Extra bonus was the markets on Sunday morning, in the park, right next to us - lovely atmosphere & great coffee 😎☀️🤩

Really a beautiful place. Best beach we have seen. The installation are well maintained and very clean. Free laundry. The owner is very caring and friendly. Would definitely recommend and go back. The little village has nice restaurants and bars. Animated.

Wow we had booked for a beachfront camp site and we were not disappointed! Stunning views of the ocean as we woke up. Plenty of facilities, camp kitchens, showers and toilets, free use of washing machine. Local tavern/bottle shop and cafes all within ha few minutes walk.  Very relaxing and peaceful.

Great location but sadly not impressed with their policy ethics!  Staff great.  Very little in the way of amenities.  Nice new toilet and shower block and free washing machine and drier.  No games room or sporting options.  Right on the beach.  Now for the negatives!   We booked in on a weekly rate of $280 which was honoured for 3 weeks then the last week it was suddenly jumped up to nearly $400 and there was only us and one other caravan in the park!  Then a tropical low developed with gusty winds predicated so management said we would have to get out because it was becoming into a cyclone.  We did the sensible thing and departed after 3 nights. We had checked with staff and was advised we would be refunded less a 5% charge and thought this was fair.  However when we went to get the refund they refused and said they never refund any unused nights!  Robbery.  Was rudely told to read confirmation send via email after after payment.  Apparently staff need to read this as well.  We were only departing due to the cyclone.   We were told we could use the nights later and we should consider ourselves lucky we were being offered this.  As an owner operator myself I find this attitude towards a guest appalling and frankly absolute greed.  Fellow travellers please be aware of "escape parks"policies... There is no flexibility and once they have your money  don't expect any flexibility even when there is a pending cyclone.  We are not happy travellers and will be very hesitant to ever book with this group again.
We loved our stay! Would definitely stay again. Beachfront site is such a luxury.

Best park and staff we’ve come across. Applaud Terry and his staff, we felt like family, everything is clean thoroughly and the sites are spacious with ocean views. Thanks Terry, we will see you again
We had a powered site which faired well in heavy rain.
Super schöner einsamer Strand direkt beim Campingplatz. Für 1 Nacht perfekt!
Welcome to paradise! Clean facilities and everything you need within walking distance plus the Sunday market right next door. Couldn’t ask for more!
Awesome!

Lovely little campsite right by the ocean, with an idyllic beach of vast clean sands. Site has all the necessary amenities other than good wifi and mobile signal, which is a big issue if you are having problems with your motorhome.
Would recommend.

This campsite has a beautiful relaxed friendly vibe . With the most amazing views and direct access to Mission beach . The ammenities are clean . Staff super friendly . Highly  recommend would love to stay here again soon .

Der Campground liegt direkt an einem traumhaft schönen und sehr langen Sandstrand.  Es ist einer der schönsten Strände, die wir kennen. Ausgedehnte Wanderungen sind hier möglich in einer bezaubernden Umgebung.  Oft sind die schwarzen Kakadus zu beobachten,  die am Boden Samen/Nüsse picken.
Der Campground ist gut ausgestattet und hat auch schattige Plätze, hat aber vor allem eine hervorragende Lage.

September 2025. Stayed here again for eight weeks. We stay every year and absolutely love the place. Terry and the staff are very helpful and friendly. Thank you very much. It is an old caravan park but they're are absolutely doing there best to keep it clean and tidy. We love the place and have booked for next year.
Deb and Norm
Fantastisk flott campingplass, rett ved stranden. Rent og ordentlig. Hyggelig uteplass med kjøkken.
Wir waren absolut zufrieden. Hier gab es alles was man braucht und die Lage am Mission Beach ist unvergleichlich.
A great place to stay right on a beautiful beach

We loved our stay at Mission Beach. We had site 13 which was absolute beachfront with spectacular views.  There's great walkways & local shops & restaurants are also just a short walk away. Found the best markets just next door
Very warm and kind welcome. We got a shady Spot without asking. Great Camping Spot!
Sites right on such a beautiful beach!

Amazing stay! Clean facilities. The view from our Motorhome topped it off the beautiful beach!
Great start to our road trip, easy check in. Would definitely return. Many thanks
Beautiful little spot

A fantastic park, right on the beach, with shady trees and beautiful views. Staff are excellent! They're friendly, helpful and hard working - always ensuring the amenities, camp kitchen and grounds are looking their best. A top spot 👍
Schitterend gelegen camping direct aan de zee. Restaurants op loopafstand. Heerlijk rustig. Sanitair is eenvoudig, maar schoon.

Emplacement parfait, plage paradisiaque, ambiance agréable et tranquille, installation propre, cuisine équipée de tout ce qu’il faut. Le seul mini défaut sont les ronds électriques qui prennent une éternité à chauffer, prévoir manger du BBQ ou air fryer! Buanderie et douches gratuites, petit plus agréable.

If you are lucky you'll get an oceanfront site. The combination of rainforest and beautiful beach is unforgettable.
Check in was quick. Very nice people.

Beautiful clean park and amenities. Friendly staff. Quiet atmosphere, A great place to stay to relax. Booked 3 nights and ended up staying on for another 2 nights. Beach front powered site 😎 👌 Mission Beach never disappoints.

The amenities and facilities were clean and tidy but the old guy who told all members of our group multiple times that we should be paying double because of "the gorgeous little German girls in the van" nearby was incredibly creepy and off putting.
Wonderful!!! Peaceful!! Perfect
Lucky enough to have a pitch with a sea view, caught the sun rise awesome, so glad we stayed

Great park , friendly staff and a magnificent location made my stay a very pleasurable experience.
I will definitely stay there next time i get the chance.

OMG wat een fantastische camping aan t mooiste strand van Queensland! Alleen maar palmbomen en andere flora
Verder rust , zon en genieten
Op 3 minuten lopen een straatje met winkeltjes, bars en restaurants
Als we ooit terug gaan naar Australië dan zeker naar deze camping
Bedankt ook voor het warme welkom!
Had a wonderful time in their caravan park they were more than helpful and it extremely accommodating.
It’s a small park, with basic facilities, but we found it to be the most enjoyable. The beachfront location, the informal layout - everything contributed to the magical experience.

PEACEFUL EASY FEELING
Absolute beachfront, no road to cross, very nice park that’s well maintained, lots of unpowered and powered sites, maybe 50, some shady under trees. Modern amenities that certainly look newish, two camp kitchens, two laundries with free, yes free modern washers and clothes dryers. Friendly staff at reception, the park is dog friendly and very close to shops, takeaways and pub. Woolies Supermarket nearby in Tully Mission Beach Road. An Arboretum in Ross Overton Park has native trees, some rain forest areas, short boardwalk and walking paths that is right beside the park. Long palm fringed beach out front with beautiful blue water that’s ideal for swimming, walking and biking. Some island views too. Watching some sky divers landing on the beach was a nice surprise. Heaps of things to do in the area. Recommended.

We overnighted better places.
A little rundown and not a cosy relaxing place
Love this camp ground. The area is sooo beautiful. Staff very accommodating. Not too crowded- great vibe.
Beautiful place. Management was very helpful.
Lovely site, great location for places to eat. The beach is next to the caravan park. We didn't want to leave
Excellent location, lovely staff and clean amenities. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay.

We had the best spot meters from the beach. Staff were friendly. Park needs some work, no concrete slabs on most sites, too many trees making parking difficult and dropping rubbish all over cars and van, very weak wifi mostly non existent.
Mooie en schone camping!
Beautiful park, great facilities

Will stay here again and again. We hate leaving! The park is right on the beach, seconds from the village and next door to the weekend market. Not to mention the Ulysses walking track and long long beach to stroll along. Friendly staff who make you feel welcome and the amenities are fine. Free washing machines and dryer. Just stay, it’s gorgeous here.
Super 👍
Great location, very friendly staff, clean and well appointed amenities with FREE washing machines

Toller Campingplatz direkt am Strand. Saubere Anlage mit allem was man braucht. Super freundliches hilfsbereites Personal. Ich empfehle rechzeitige Reservierung es gibt 50 Plätze, die sind schnell voll.
Best campground on our whole roadtrip. Perfect location right at the beach, clean facilities, free laundry. Really enjoyed it!

I could not be happier anywhere else. The team at MBC&CP work tirelessly to ensure guests are well catered for, and well looked after. They care and it shows. I am so glad we landed here. Can't wait to get back !

I say this daily...
There are places in the world as beautiful as Mission Beach , but none more beautiful!
⛱️🌊🌴

We just loved our stay even if it was short. We have booked a longer stay for next year.
Love Mission Beach and love the CP. it’s a gem.
Mandy and Joe

The camping ground is a tropical holiday dream location. And situated directly on a long stretch of palm lined, white sandy beach, with a view to Dunk Island. A fantastic well equipped camp kitchen, laundry and amenities. A short stroll along a rainforest tree lined track, to a choice of cafes, restaurants and bars. The staff are friendly, helpful and relaxed. Three weeks wasn't long enough. We loved our stay so much, we're planning to return, next year.

Totally recommend this great little caravan park over the other larger ones in town. Friendly operators, right in the beach, large sites, plenty of shade and centrally located to walk to shops, eateries, pubs etc. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay, only wish we’d booked longer!

We only had a short stay but enjoyed our stay. Right on the beachfront, small park and also dog friendly. Amenities were clean and the grounds kept tidy. Walking distance to lovely restaurants and shops.
Would definitely recommend this park, it is relaxing and easy access to everything you need
Have booked in for a longer stay next year.
Great location on the beach. Nice sites.
Outstanding location people and vibe. A true holiday location with a management who run a terrific business
Very beautiful campsite located right on the stunning beach.
A simply stunning spot.  I really didn’t want to leave.  Friendly, knowledgeable staff.  Clean amenities.  🩷

Sehr schöner Platz. Top Lage, liebe Menschen, saubere Duschen, Toiletten und fantastische Grillpätze. Sehr gute Erreichbarkeit, wir sind etwas später wie geplant angereist, hat alles prima geklappt. Danke!!!!
Lovely place.
Great spot, needed longer there!
Great location, right on the beach front. Great sunrise
very basic but lovely campsite, with powered sites available, right on the beach. Lovely people all around. Good and clean amenities.
Great little park righton beach
Lovely spot right on the beach. Small park, amenities are good. It could do with some dim lights in the gardens for nighttime trips to the toilets.
Awesome spot
Great park, amazing beach & view, so close to all shops  cafes and restaurants. The staff are friendly especially Mel she is awesome 👌

Had a great experience here. Obviously the location is amazing at Mission Beach looking out across to Dunk Island, but really appreciated the great facilities the park provided. Had a nice shared kitchen and very clean bathroom facilities with hot showers, and plenty of rubbish bins around the park. Staff were all friendly. Will definitely be back!
Great beach. Great spot looking over beach. Fairly crowded tho
Fantastic beach and fishing offshore. Ammenities have been upgraded too.

We stayed here recently and can’t wait to return. We were greeted with friendly service on arrival, the man who was working there at the time (didn’t catch his name), was so helpful, providing plenty of information and support to get into site. Easy access to beach and we loved the short stroll along the beach to access food and drinks in the centre of town.
Nice little park,  amenities are good and clean,  some sites are a bit tight. But overall great park right on the beach.
What a fantastic spot, the minute we parked up we went back to the office to see if we could extend our stay. Beautifully clean facilities
It is an interesting area, close to Dunk Island and National Park land. Mission beach shopping precinct is a bit old but the council is doing a lot of work at the moment. Will be nice when finished.

Cooler Campingplatz direkt am Strand. Der Checkin hat total easy funktioniert und die Mitarbeiterin war sehr freundlich. Wir hatten einen powered Stellplatz für eine Nacht. Die WC’s und Duschen waren sauber und die Duschkabinen sogar sehr groß. Wäschewaschen kann man für 5$. Waschmittel ist dort. Wäschetrockner hat 6$ gekostet. Man kann jedoch nur mit Münzen zahlen - wechseln kann man in Office.
Können den Campingplatz wärmstens empfehlen!

Right on Beach. Mixture of slabs or grass for caravans, tents etc.
Very good, clean amenities.
Gr8 Friendly Management.
Park a bit 'rustic' but part of its appeal. We were there Anzac Long Weekend, extremely wet and windy but still had good time.

Schöner kleiner Zeltplatz mit ausgesprochen freundlichen Personal. Es gibt in der ersten Reihe wunderschöne Stellplätze mit Blick aufs Meer. Die Sanitäreinrichtungen sind sauber. Küche mit den üblichen Einrichtungen ist vorhanden und auch sauber.

Das Highlight ist natürlich der kilometerlange Strand an dem man unendlich wandern kann. Neben dem wunderschönen Strand in Mission Beach, ist es auch eine gute Idee von diesem Fleck aus eine Fahrt zum Great Barrier Reef zu machen.
Es gibt mehrere Anbieter. Wir haben  Dunk Island Reef Adventures  ausgewählt und waren sehr zufrieden. Sie holen am Campingplatz ab und bringen einen abends wieder zurück. Die Gruppen sind nicht so groß. Die Betreuung ist super freundlich und professionell. Außerdem kommt man vom Mission Beach relativ schnell zum Outer Reef.

The location is awesome 😝 🫡
The sites are a little squeezey however we did fit OK. 8.5 metres
The amenities are a little old however they were clean and tidy every day.
Short walk to the little town.
There are plenty of bins around as well as recycling ♻️ bags.
We were here between Easter and Anzac 🇦🇺 and it was still busy every day so I would definitely recommend booking in advance.
There are open sites and very shady sites so be specific in your preferred.
We had a great spot on beach front, very friendly service from staff also

Absolut lohnenswerter Zwischenstopp auf unserem Roadtrip von Sydney nach Cairns. Der Campingplatz liegt ideal direkt am weiten von Palmen gesäumten Strand. Das Camp-Gelände ist teilweise naturbelassen, teilweise versiegelt. Wir hatten Glück und ergatterten einen Stellplatz mit Strom direkt am Wasser.  Schöner kann man nicht stehen! Die Sanitäranlagen sind allesamt in gutem Zustand, sie wurden wohl erst kürzlich renoviert. Ideal die Lage des Platzes auch zum kleinen, liebevollen Ortszentrum, das man in zwei Minuten zu Fuß erreicht. Insgesamt also rundum eine Empfehlung.

What an amazing experience! It’s quiet at night, and you’ve got everything you need. Close to the beach with a fantastic view all around. Two kitchens, restrooms, hot water—all clean. Lovely caretaker.

Camping met het meest behulpzame personeel dat je je kan voorstellen. De koelkast in onze auto werkte niet zoals we dat wilden en daar is naar gekeken, er is geholpen met onze daktent voor de eerste keer uit- en inklappen én we werden naar de supermarkt gereden toen we schoonmaakspullen nodig hadden!! Alle faciliteiten zijn goed onderhouden en schoon. Zeker een goede plek om een paar nachten te staan.

Schöner Campingplatz mit sauberen Sanitäranlagen und super Lage am Strand. Das Personal war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Während unserem Aufenthalt war auf unserer Route eine Straße gesperrt. Der Besitzer (?) hatte uns darauf hingewiesen, Updates und Tipps gegeben, wie wir trotzdem weiterfahren können.

Myself and my friend had the most lovely one night stay here and would love to thank the man on reception (so sorry didn’t get your name) who kept us informed about the road closures down south and also moved us to a breezier spot due to the heat! Would absolutely recommend

What an amazing gem. This caravan has it all. Right on the beach and a short walk into town. Check in was a breeze and since i arrived late they provided me with the paperwork that was easy to find. Water, power, and sewage disposal were super convenient. I would highly recommend this place to anyone that's wants to get away and enjoy some R&R.
Super Aussicht vom Beachfront-Stellplatz. Die Stellplätze sind eher kleiner. WC-Anlagen sind durchschnittlich

Schöner recht kleiner Campingplatz direkt am traumhaften Strand von Mission Beach. Ich empfehle sehr einen Platz mit Strand Sicht zu buchen. Saubere und moderne sanitäre Anlagen. Ein Stern Abzug, da das WLAN nur direkt vor der Rezeption und nicht an unserem Platz funktionierte.
Got your basic needs.
Richtig schöner Spot wirklich direkt am schönen tropischen Strand. Wir waren nur eine Nacht da, aber haben es sehr genossen.

The park is located next to the beach. The setting is very beautiful. The amenities are basic and clean. There are a lot of palms and the beach is very nice. We enjoyed a wonderful sunrise and saw a sting ray in the water.
What a gem! Beautiful shady quiet beach front site. Immaculate facilities and easy stroll to local bars and cafes
Great location right on the beach, friendly host and good facilities

Such a nice Camping place
Its right on the beach
Camping sites are nice  and shady Got everything you need shops pub down the road Really enjoyed my stay there  😃😃
Loved this place. So relaxing and right on the beach.
Thank you to the great staff, and an extra thank you to Tayelia who made our stay so extra special with her smiles and happiness.

Der Campingplatz in Mission Beach ist sehr schön. Die Lage direkt am Strand ist unschlagbar – man wacht mit Blick auf das Meer auf und hat direkten Zugang zum wunderschönen Sandstrand. Die Stellplätze sind gepflegt und geräumig, und die sanitären Anlagen waren stets sauber. Besonders schön ist die entspannte Atmosphäre und das freundliche Personal. Ein perfekter Ort, um die Natur zu genießen und sich zu erholen. Würde definitiv wiederkommen!

Unser Aufenthalt im BIG4 Tasman Holiday Parks - South Mission Beach im Oktober war fantastisch! Die Lage des Campgrounds ist wunderschön – direkt am Strand mit herrlichem Blick auf die vorgelagerten Inseln und viel tropischer Vegetation ringsherum. Der perfekte Ort, um ein paar Tage in Ruhe und Natur zu geniessen.

Die Stellplätze sind grosszügig, gepflegt und bieten genug Privatsphäre und Schatten, sodass wir uns sofort rundum wohlgefühlt haben. Die Einrichtungen waren sauber und gut ausgestattet. Das Team war sehr freundlich und stets hilfsbereit.

Die Nähe zum Strand und die Möglichkeit, viele tolle Outdoor-Aktivitäten zu unternehmen, machen diesen Park zu einem grossartigen Ziel für alle, die Süd-Queensland erkunden möchten. Wir empfehlen diesen Platz wärmstens weiter!
Super friendly and helpful owner! Really nice guy. The campside is directly at the beach and everything is clean. Would always come again!
nice enough site, wifi didn’t work at all which ruined it for us. no pool. weirdos hanging around. wouldn’t come back
Absolutely beautiful location, we requested a beachfront spot which was definitely worth it.  Walking distance to bars and restaurants.  Staff friendly and helpful.
Toilet and shower are clean. Big sites, on the beach, close to restaurants and shops.

We had such a wonderful 4 weeks stay at this caravan park. We had the perfect site with a view of the beach, adjacent to the park, amenities and camp kitchen.  Close proximity to the shops and rainforest walks.  Dog friendly.  The park is well maintained and staff very friendly.

Staff were helpful.Clean amenities and views were just spectacular,  Rustic ambience and close to good eateries.

We loved it and will be back
The best campsite we stayed at, the facilities were so clean and lovely. You cannot fault the location either!

Nice camping and nice people. Everything was set and ready when we arrived, even though we made a late arrival.
The camping is nice, beautiful and clean!
Spent 2 nights here on a beach side camp site. Absolutely loved it. 20 steps to the beach. The caretakers are lovely & friendly. Amenities were clean. Would definitely return. Thanks

Mission beach caravan park was an amazing place to stay. The park amenities were clean and well maintained. The staff were great to deal with.
The beach it self was absolutely stunning.

Perfekte Lage direkt am Strand! Toller Sonnenaufgang überm Meer! Netter kleiner Campingplatz mit guten sauberen Amenities. In Fussreichweite liegt der Ortskern mit etlichen Geschäfte und Restaurants, Bard und Cafés! Top!

Fabulous location right on the beach. We were lucky enough to be upgraded to a beachfront site. Lovely park, no cabins, all caravans & camping. Staff were very friendly & helpful, lovely clean amenities. Sunday markets right next door are a must do.

Camping familial avec une très bonne ambiance et un accueil chaleureux. L’emplacement est idyllique, direct sur la plage, contrairement aux autres campings de Mission Beach où vous devez traverser la route principale. C’est idéal avec des enfants.

We booked online gave correct measurements they showed us the site it was for a van size wouldn't recommend to anyone the girl was do rude wr just left went else where. The vans are so cramped I  there it was a joke. I asked were do I park the car as there was no room she said anywhere so long as it was off the road we never went to a park so under managed.
Close to the ocean and beach walks
Nice spot on the water, a bit expensive but pretty.
Good amenities, great location,  Terry was a great manager, very helpful. Trees need to be trimmed of older branches to allow more sunshine. Very quiet park.
Super recommended! Excellent location in front of the beach, bathroom clean and nice staff.
Terry was great

It's a great place to drop in for a spot of camping ! This was my first visit and won't be my last. We got a site to park the boat and car at and rolled out my swag. A very short walk to the beach before heading into town for dinner was great.

We have stayed at Mission Beach Camping & Caravan Park 4 times now and will keep coming back.  Perfect location right on the beach and all you need in walking distance. Amenities are clean and well set up. Staff are awesome!

Great spot.  I had a beachfront pitch.  Quiet park only a short walk along the beach path to a cafes and restaurants.  Very clean amenities.  Arrived 2 hours before checkin - staff really helpful and were able to accommodate my excessively early arrival.  Would stay again.

We luckily jagged a front site when someone cancelled. What a spot !
Beach is beautiful. Sunrises are beautiful. People are beautiful.
Great spot, nice amenities and the friendliest of staff.

I only gave 3 stars due to the weather. It rained pretty much the whole time. I can only imagine how beautiful the caravan park would be if we had better weather. Had to trapes through puddles to get to camp kitchen. The kitchen needs more supplies, as was very limited. Also could not find the switch for lights, so was even harder to do cooking & washing up. Ask at reception about light switch. Have to boil kettle for hot water.
Caravan sites are very tight. But very close to the beach.
Would love to be here during better weather.

Great spot on the beach.
Close to restaurants and pubs.
Booked 2, stayed 3. Definitely worth the extra night.
Great spot right on the beach, amenities, good price and fantastic staff! Keep up the great work guys!
Paradise
Fabulous location, and all advertised services were provided. Facilities very well maintained. No doubts coming back to Mission Beach and staying here.

Would be buy far be the friendliest park we stayed at.
The amenities are beautiful and so clean.
Great job guys, we will be back

Located directly on the Beach.
Amazing place to Visit. 12 years since the last time we came here and it’s still the same. Camping Ground is standard and reasonably priced. Facilities are clean and good quality. Highly recommend stopping off here.
Right on the beach. Nice and close to shops
Great spot right on the beach and close to pub and shops
Nice relaxed vibe and the caretaker very helpful showing us around so we could pick our site. Perfect location to town.
Beautiful location ,walking distance to everything the trees are amazing the saff are so friendly and the umenaties are so clean  a magic spot.

Absolutely breathtaking waking up early and literally a stones throw from the beach to watch the sun rise on the most glorious beach.
The staff are nothing short of amazing, special shout out to Tailia (I know I've got that wrong). Amenities are great. Fabulous location! Will definitely be back.
Right on the beach. Very friendly staff. Modern toilet block.
Great spot to camp

Naturbelassen der Platz genauso wie der Strand.
Keine Überfüllung an Menschenansammlungen, sehr tolles Personal , Freundlich und Hilfsbereit,

Die Gute Seele ist die Dame für alles mit Dreadlocks huscht sie überall über den Platz., sorgt dafür das die Außenküche , Duschen und Toiletten , Topi sind, an der Repression Freundlich und Hilfsbeteit.

Der Gartenmann auch immer Freundlich und für ein Gespräch gut.
Dann noch Andy , Dauercamper er Hilft allen , die noch spàter ankommen , immer men Spruch auf den Lippen.

Dann der Chef, sein Spruch , ich bin nicht die Information , hinten 5 Minuten, hi no Information Man , immer freundlich.

Ps.Die Australier sind freundlich, hier noch mehr , habe 1 Capman Zelt geschenkt bekommen und ein Klo Zelt.
3 Nàchte war ich da -2 mit Dauerregen und Sturm.
Die Leute wollten nichts haben , kein Geld, kein Bier, kein Essen.Habe natûrlich was geholt.

Danke an alle

Mit freundlichen , lieben Grûßen
Heidi Bûchsenschûtz- Schûtz❤️❤️🥰🥰🥰🍀🍀🍀🌼🌼🌈🌈🌈☀️☀️☀️

Great location. I had a nice shady spot, Bay 7, close to the beach and access track. The code for ammenities only worked sometimes, staff were friendly. Awesome beach to ride my bike and once the stinger barrier had been put out great for a swim, well, more like a warm bath. Great cafes close by. Great place to chill out.
Beautiful site right on the ocean, you will need mosses spray as they were pretty bad when we were there.

Great location. Staff very friendly and efficient.
Amenities clean.
14-17 feb 2024.
Powered shady site, $45pn.

Parken mit dem Campervan in der ersten Reihe auf einem schattigen Plätzchen gleich am Strand. Ideale Bedingungen zum Joggen am Morgen oder am Abend. Ortskern auch zu Fuß erreichbar. Amenities sauber und gut funktionierend. Alles gut!
Traumhaft schön zum Joggen ein Traum!!

We loved our stay at this park . We arrived pre kirrily cyclone and the Manager was more than accommodating and very helpful.
We will definitely be going back for a longer holiday .

This place is perfect, we had a beach side spot, if we were any closer we would have been parking on the beach!!! Such a beautiful idyllic spot. The lady on reception was very helpful, friendly and chatty, she gave us lots of great information. We only stayed for 1 night but boy do I wish we had stayed longer. Will certainly go back here to explore the area more
Lovely beach front spot with good amenities & a market on Sundays

We had a 7 night stay, we love this park its clean & tidy.. Terry is great all do we were a little disappointed you didn't remember us Doyle Terry 🤣  we wont leave it as long the next time we don't want you forgetting us again 😉 all going well see you in May or June. Thanks again.

We’ve had a fabulous stay here. The highlights were definitely the absolutely stunning beach, the coconuts laying around everywhere and the fact that it has the friendliest caretaker ever! Amenities were clean, as was the kitchen. Definitely recommended :)
Solid facilities (clean bathrooms!!) and adjacent to one of the most beautiful beaches I've ever visited. I cannot recommend strongly enough.

Wir waren 2 Nächte da (Dezember 23). Geplant war nur eine, allerdings mussten wir kurzfristig umplanen und standen dann am Samstag abend ohne Campingplatz da. Das Office war zwar nicht mehr besetzt aber wir haben angerufen und wurden weiter geleitet. Die Dame war sehr hilfsbereit und hat uns eine Nacht früher einchecken lassen und uns die Codes für Badezimmer & Wlan und die Karte des Campingplatzes zugeschickt. Wir waren sehr froh. Der Campingplatz ist sauber, wunderbare Lage direkt am Mission Beach & in 5 minuten Gehweg erreicht man Bar/Cafés und Restaurants. Die Sanitäranlagen sind ziemlich sauber & aufgeräumt. Wir wären gerne länger geblieben wenn wir mehr Zeit hätten. Einziger Minuspunkt würde ich bei der Waschmaschine-Tumbler geben (nur 1x vorhanden), da wir nicht waschen mussten, war dies für uns aber kein Problem.
A fantastic site, clean and with a great location. The people were very kind and service minded )0(
Great spot to view water shame you cannot swim in it due to stingers and resident crocs. Beware of snakes and falling coconuts. Security a bit dodgy & no on-site after hours manager.
We had a great time and will definitely be back!
Beautiful camp site at the beach! After hours check in was easy. Clean amenities.
Good new amenities and location. Sites are a bit small
So beautiful and right on the beach
This is by far my favourite spot of our trip so far, the water was so incredibly warm. The site had incredible views of the water
Great spot perfect views staff are woderful

Awesome spot. Staff here are friendly and helpful, the park is clean and quiet, and is in the most stunning spot right on the beach. Short stroll to the pub, the Blues Bar and food outlets. Honestly one of the best places you could stay, and it's great value too.

Perfect location! right on the beach, lovely clean amenities!!
Fantastic service from staff. The man was so kindly and consider with us! We'll be back 🙏🏼❤️✅

Perhaps the best location for a caravan park in mission beach. I went on the weekend and tried to walk in for a camp site, I brought a very small and simple tent btw. Luckily they managed to squeeze me in for a small place.
They said they have been busy for many weeks so it is advised that you make a reservation before going. Else guess the another caravan park will be far away

The beach is within walking distance, the town is walking distance too.
So basically you can just park your car there and walk everywhere. Not the supermarket of course, Woolies is like 10mins driving distance from the park

The facilities are not really that great but they have the basic stuff, power, water, toilet, shower room, kitchen

Dog friendly
No open fire allowed

And most importantly! The location!

Fabulous stay, right on the beach  .
Amenities are so clean
Great location, super chill vibe, friendly staff and good value. Website is clunky but worth pushing through to get a spot, and book early it is in high demand in peak season.
Camping agréable, cuisine et sanitaires propre. Emplacement parfait, plage à quelques secondes à pied

Position position position !

Look out to the beach from your campsite ❣️
Mission Beach was not on our list but so glad we did 😍
Such a beautiful vibe.

This park is quite basic. Most sites on sand. The slab sites are just one complete slab for 8 (?) vans.

No where to tie down awnings etc.
There are some sandbags and large containers filled with water to tie to, but not enough to go around.
The amenities are cleaned daily but get dirty fast with people washing the sand off. Staff friendly and helpful. One older camp kitchen and one modern one.
Laundry tired and no hand washing sink.
Still, this is a great spot to explore the area. Much better than across the road where it just feels like every other caravan park. Love looking at the beach ❣️
Close to rain forest, on the beach over looking Dunk Island
Great caravan park, 1min walk to the beach. New amenities and the manager Terry is so helpful.

Location, location, location!  A great park located right on the beach, close to the rainforest and to town!  Great facilities, clean, well maintained and such a relaxed environment.  Terry and his staff do an amazing job…..see you all next year!
Es
Great temperature very nice place

We loved it here! The weather wasn't perfect but this is the most beautiful spot and the staff were amazing!
A lot of older visitors and we are a family but most of the people we so super friendly to us and the kids. This is so nice to see! Loved our time here and can't wait to come back one day
Beautiful spot, clean facilities and everyone is so friendly.
Great little park, payed $37 for unpowered site, had a great view of beach.  Its a small family friendly town.
Nice park and great places to eat at.

We had a great stay here we had a surprise on arrival meeting old friends travelling in a different direction staying for the same few days. Right on the beach lovely markets right next door a tavern across the road quirky little village plenty of coffee shops. Well worth checking out.
Amazing view. Loved it.
We we’re here for 7 nights, loved the park and it’s beautiful beach.

Fantastic, very accommodating, we got a camp site about 20m walk from the beach which was amazing!

Facilities clean and showers hot and powerful! Fantastic!
Have been to mission beach previously and once again thoroughly  enjoyed it. Close to great beach and shops. Staff were more than helpful thankyou for a great time

Loved Mission Beach. Mission Beach Camping & Caravan park is right on the beachfront. Although our site was a little cramped we thoroughly enjoyed our stay. We had a beachfront site so only a few steps and onto the beach. The beach was the best one I have ever seen. So quiet and peaceful you could go for long walks along the beach or just sit an enjoy the views. Amenities were clean.  The staff were very helpful and friendly at all times.  Would highly recommend this place we will be back.
Perfect location, right on the beach, lovely clean amenities. All Restaurants, tavern, groceries only 1minute walk. Fantastic service from staff and camping spot ideal. We'll be back
